View this page

chem¶

Chemistry¶

Chemistry utilities, specifically wrappers for RDKit objects and IO functionality.

Functions

convert(files, output[, extra])

Convert one or more molecule files into another using openbabel.

smarts_index(smarts, index)

Find the element of the n-th smarts token

save_smiles(file, smiles)

Saves a list of SMILES to a .smi file.

save_sdf_library(file, mols[, conformers, ...])

Saves a list of IsomerCollection instances to an SDF file.

load_sdf_or_mae_library(file[, ...])

Loads an SDF or MAE library containing multiple molecules with potentially multiple isomers each, and creates an IsomerCollection for all of them.

load_sdf_library(file[, split_strategy, ...])

Loads an SDF or MAE library containing multiple molecules with potentially multiple isomers each, and creates an IsomerCollection for all of them.

merge_isomers(iso_a, iso_b[, ...])

Merges conformers and tags of two chemically identical isomers.

merge_collections(coll_a, coll_b[, tag, ...])

Merges isomers and tags of two chemically identical IsomerCollections.

merge_libraries(lib_a, lib_b[, moltag, ...])

Merges IsomerCollections of two libraries recursively.

mcs(*mols[, timeout])

Finds the maximum common substructure (MCS) between multiple molecules.

rmsd(mol, ref[, timeout])

Calculate the unaligned root-mean-square deviation between all conformers of an isomer and a reference molecule.

Classes

Isomer

Thin shim layer for rdkit molecules.

IsomerCollection

Represents a collection of isomers / enumerations of a molecule.

Conformer

Thin shim layer for rdkit conformers.
